author: Michael Shatny
tagline: Building languages, tools, and publishing infrastructure. This page compiles from changelog.rcl.

projects.title: RECALL Compiler
projects.desc: COBOL-inspired publishing language for the web. Compiles .rcl source to self-contained HTML. v1.1.0 live.

projects.title: EMBER
projects.desc: A structured markup language designed for AI agents — the third reader between humans and machines.

projects.title: StratIQX
projects.desc: 6D cascade analysis case study library. 228 cases published. CAL-driven intelligence framework.

projects.title: This Page
projects.desc: A live changelog compiled from changelog.rcl using RECALL. Update the JSON, run recall compile, push.
